On this page

  • Set Up
  • Goals of this analysis, find the answers to the following questions:
  • Import data
  • Which book most the most commonly banned across all districts for each year?
  • Which author has the most banned books overall?
  • Which state has the most banned titles overall

02-analysis

Set Up

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)

Goals of this analysis, find the answers to the following questions:

  • Which author has the most banned books overall?
    • Per year?
    • Per state?
  • Which state has the most banned titles overall?
  • Which book most the most commonly banned across all districts for each year?
  • How many books were banned each state during each school year?
    • Which districts in Texas banned the most books each year? The least?
    • Which districts in Texas have banned the most books overall?
  • Are the most common books banned nationwide consistent with bans in Texas?
  • How has the percentage of books changed each school year?

Import data

PEN_files <- read_rds("data-processed/PEN-files.rds") 

PEN_files |> glimpse()
Rows: 22,659
Columns: 14
$ author                    <chr> "McCafferty, Megan", "Gabaldon, Diana", "Kob…
$ title                     <chr> "Sloppy Firsts (Jessica Darling Series)", "O…
$ secondary_author_s        <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, …
$ illustrator_s             <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, …
$ translator_s              <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, …
$ state                     <chr> "Florida", "Florida", "Florida", "Florida", …
$ district                  <chr> "Walton County School District", "Walton Cou…
$ date_of_challenge_removal <chr> "Apr-22", "Apr-22", "Apr-22", "Apr-22", "Apr…
$ origin_of_challenge       <chr> "Administrator", "Administrator", "Administr…
$ challenge_removal         <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, …
$ initiating_action         <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, …
$ year                      <chr> "2021-2022", "2021-2022", "2021-2022", "2021…
$ ban_standing              <chr> "Banned Pending Investigation", "Banned Pend…
$ book_series               <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, …

Which book most the most commonly banned across all districts for each year?

Which author has the most banned books overall?

PEN_files |> 
  group_by(author) |> 
  summarise(appearances = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(appearances))

Data Takeaway:

Ellen Hopkins, Sarah J. Mass and Stephen King have been the top three most commonly banned authors between the 2021-22 and 2024-25 school years. Ellen Hopkins has the most banned titles, with 435 of her books banned across school districts nationwide. Sarah J. Mass has 338 titles banned, and Stephen King has 219 titles banned across school districts.

Per year

PEN_files |>
  filter(year == "2021-2022") |>
  group_by(author) |> 
  summarise(appearance = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(appearance))
PEN_files |>
  filter(year == "2022-2023") |>
  group_by(author) |> 
  summarise(appearance = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(appearance))
PEN_files |>
  filter(year == "2023-2024") |>
  group_by(author) |> 
  summarise(appearance = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(appearance))
PEN_files |>
  filter(year == "2024-2025") |>
  group_by(author) |> 
  summarise(appearance = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(appearance))
  • want to find a way to get these all into one chart…pivot data???

Data Takeaway:

Elle Hopkins had the most books banned in all school years, except for 2024-2024. That year, the most banned books where Stephen King titles, reaching a total of 206. During the 2023-2024 school year, 523 Elle Hopkins titles were banned, which is the most titles banned from a single author in a school year.

Per state

PEN_files |> 
  select(state, author, year) |> 
  group_by(state) |> 
  summarise(total_authors = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(total_authors))
  • not sure how to do this so that I am able to get sums specifically by author

Which state has the most banned titles overall

PEN_files |> 
  distinct(state, title, year) |> 
  group_by(state) |> 
  summarise(total_titles = n()) |> 
  arrange(desc(total_titles))

Data Takeaway: Overall, Florida has the highest number of banned titles, with a total of 5582. The second highest is Texas, with 2987 banned titles.
